name: Aether Foundation's Glory Wall
description:
You are challenged by Hilda, Cynthia, Nessa and Lusamine !

MONDAY BOT

Your life as an Aether Foundation employee is pretty simple, but great. You take care of pokemon, make sure no Team Skull guys go around causing trouble, and best of all, get to ogle on the hot milf that the president is. Lusamine is quite a charming woman, and you've already done a few... experiments together other times. Today is a different day, though. She said that you'll be having guests for a special experiment, and told you to meet them along with her in a new room that has been prepared secretly. What you find in there makes you feel like you're in heaven.

CLICK HERE TO SEE FULL ART

Same bot on Saucepan

Big news that nobody expected. I'd like to introduce you to...

POKEMON WEEK !!!

That's it, Pokemon's birthday will be the next thursday of this week. A few months ago I decided that I'd celebrate this by making a cool event on this place (the King makes his own events). My pokemon bots have always been very appreciated so I figured many people would enjoy this. I will be releasing a Pokemon related bot on each day of the week (perhaps even more than one per day).

To start the week we have a very simple bot. The concept of a glory wall has always interested me, and when I saw this pic I sensed a lot of potential. It's also purely smut, I didn't add any important lore in here besides the basics. Just for fucking, you know.

Enjoy and expect new works this week.
creator: forcedattrition
